reference: I have pain on the right side of my middle back. I have had it for three days now. It doesn’t hurt to breathe, but it is painful inside when I stretch my shoulders. The pain goes from left to right across my back. I do not recall doing anything to injure myself. I do have a sixteen-month-old granddaughter that I carry around at times, but I have never had this pain before.
